runTitle: Dashboard mobile overlap and AI sidebar local QA
coveredSurfaces: /dashboard mobile header at 390x844: no horizontal scroll and no logo/AI/login overlap
/dashboard mobile AI sidebar open: full-width dialog left 0/right viewport, dashboard menu trigger hidden
/dashboard desktop AI sidebar open: left side navigation collapses to 64px rail
/dashboard desktop AI sidebar resize handle: drag changed width from 680px to 840px
/dashboard/ai-assistant embedded AI workspace: sidebar auto-closed and page route rendered without dialog
browser console error check: 0 errors observed during targeted local QA
skippedSurfaces: Vercel production validation: local UI/layout source verification only
AI backend streaming response quality: not required for app-shell layout overlap fix
Cloud Run admin observability endpoints: out of scope

artifacts.label: Mobile AI sidebar overlap fix screenshot
artifacts.note: 390x844 local browser viewport after AI sidebar open; dialog spans x=0..390 and dashboard menu trigger is hidden

completedImprovements.title: 모바일 대시보드 헤더 가로 overflow 및 버튼 겹침 해소
completedImprovements.evidence: Chrome DevTools MCP 390x844: body/doc scrollWidth 390, AI CTA right 327px, login right 374px

completedImprovements.title: 모바일 AI 사이드바 이중 래퍼로 인한 우측 밀림 제거
completedImprovements.evidence: Chrome DevTools MCP: opened dialog rect x=0 width=390 right=390

completedImprovements.title: 모바일 AI 사이드바 오픈 시 좌측 대시보드 메뉴 버튼 겹침 방지
completedImprovements.evidence: Chrome DevTools MCP: AI sidebar open state에서 대시보드 메뉴 열기 버튼 count 0

completedImprovements.title: AI 사이드바 래퍼 제거 후 데스크톱 resize 동작 유지
completedImprovements.evidence: Chrome DevTools MCP drag: dialog width 680px -> 840px

notes: Local dev server was restarted after clearing .next to avoid stale Turbopack bundles before browser QA.

Initial Playwright MCP probing identified mobile header overflow and mobile AI sidebar/menu overlap; Chrome DevTools MCP was used for final viewport/emulation measurements after the Playwright MCP page context closed.
Validation gates passed: npm run type-check, npm run lint, targeted Vitest suites (8 files / 47 tests), npm run test:quick, git diff --check.
Browser console errors observed during targeted QA: 0. Local development warnings were non-blocking.
